inputs.label: Annual Service Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total annual revenue from HVAC service contracts. Based on industry standard financial reporting (GAAP).

inputs.label: Callback Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of service calls that result in a callback within warranty period. Benchmark from ACCA (Air Conditioning Contractors of America) quality standards.

inputs.label: Average Cost per Callback
inputs.businessContext: Average direct cost (labor, parts, travel) per callback. Based on industry operational data.

inputs.label: Warranty Period (months)
inputs.businessContext: Standard warranty period for HVAC installations. Typical range 12-60 months per manufacturer guidelines.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment. Based on Six Sigma data quality assessment.

inputs.label: Include Hidden Costs (e.g., reputation loss)
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include intangible costs like customer churn and brand damage. Based on balanced scorecard approach.

thresholds.callbackRate > 10: High callback rate indicates systemic quality issues. Consider root cause analysis.
thresholds.callbackRate > 20: Critical callback rate. Immediate action required to avoid contract penalties.

suggestedActions: Implement root cause analysis for callbacks
